name: ultimate-seo-geo
description: SEO + GEO audits for AI coding agents: health scores, technical checks, Schema.org, E-E-A-T, AI search visibility. 31 scripts; HTML/XLSX/PDF. Default reports use seed URL + capped crawls; generate_report.py --crawl-deep for broader link/canonical scans. Optional MCP (Firecrawl, DataForSEO). Progressive disclosure via SKILL + references/procedures/. LLM-agnostic.

plugins.name: ultimate-seo-geo
plugins.description: Scored SEO audits for developers/marketers using AI agents: technical health, JSON-LD, E-E-A-T, backlinks, GEO (AI Overviews, ChatGPT, Perplexity). 31 scripts; HTML/Excel/PDF. Default capped crawl scope; --crawl-deep for multi-page broken links + canonical. Optional MCP (Firecrawl, DataForSEO). Parallel workers: agents/PARALLEL-AUDIT.md. Modes: Audit → Plan → Execute.
